message:
Clean up spawn macro match arm and suppress sqlite cast precision lint

spawn.rs:
- Refactored match on Expr::Closure to idiomatic if-let/else, which
  better communicates that the closure case is the special path and the
  else branch is the general wrapper. No behavioral change.

sqlite.rs:
- Added #[allow(clippy::cast_precision_loss)] on the i64-to-f64 cast
  in SqliteValue::as_real(). The cast is intentional — SQLite integers
  that exceed f64 mantissa range are rare in practice and the caller
  expects numeric coercion. Suppressing the lint avoids false-positive
  noise in CI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
